compiled_state.title: Document --data flag findings per template
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md` documenting all required --data flags and validation results.

### Content Structure
- Summary: validation approach and overall result
- Per-template sections (NextJS, Flask, Rails) with:
  - Table: flag name | type | default value | required/optional
  - Installation result (exit code, any warnings)
  - Omit-flag test result (confirms non-zero exit vs hang)
- Install path results (uv vs pipx — which succeeded, which failed, timing)
- Exact nava-platform commit/SHA tested
- Issues encountered or blockers discovered
- If script execution produces errors for any template, document those errors rather than blocking

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — Markdown documentation file with no executable logic

### File Impact
- CREATE: `plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Findings file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md
- [ ] Documents NextJS template with --data flags
  Verify: grep -q "NextJS" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md && grep -A5 "NextJS" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md | grep -q "\-\-data\|data flag"
- [ ] Documents Flask template with --data flags
  Verify: grep -q "Flask" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md && grep -A5 "Flask" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md | grep -q "\-\-data\|data flag"
- [ ] Documents Rails template with --data flags
  Verify: grep -q "Rails" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md && grep -A5 "Rails" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md | grep -q "\-\-data\|data flag"
- [ ] Includes commit reference
  Verify: grep -qi "commit\|version\|sha" plugins/dso/docs/findings/nava-platform-headless-findings.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ All AC checks pass: file exists, NextJS+Flask+Rails sections each contain --data flag references, commit/version reference included.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: findings document created with --data flags for all 3 templates.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
